unapproved_reason: The timing-reading area used captured visible table samples and a local lightweight timing engine path. The user requires cloning the calculation mechanism from an established implementation, not sample output matching or from-scratch approximations.

clone_policy.copy_target: public calculator behavior, calculation categories, output structure, and validation samples
clone_policy.reason: The app must stop starting from zero. It first reproduces established free calculator behavior, then improves the Japanese reading layer.

security_audit.safe_surface: visible table fields and numeric values only

source_adapter.rule: timing readings use source visible-output data first; local lightweight timing calculations are not used as clone results

source_output_samples.production_scope: source visible-output clone samples, not independent calculation engine

primary_reference_site.name: Astrology Readings Online
primary_reference_site.why_primary: The public navigation exposes the four required timing methods in one site family.

secondary_reference_sites.name: Astro-Seek
secondary_reference_sites.role: cross-check when opened manually in a browser; automated fetch may show Cloudflare

secondary_reference_sites.name: Authority Astrology
secondary_reference_sites.role: secondary public behavior reference for transit, progressed, and solar return calculators

compatibility_contract.secondary_progression_rule: one day after birth equals one year of life
compatibility_contract.solar_return_rule: exact moment transiting Sun returns to natal Sun longitude
compatibility_contract.transit_rule: current moving planets compared to natal points by major aspects

reference_fixtures.test_input: 1990-01-01 12:00 Asia/Tokyo Osaka, Japan / solar return year 2026
reference_fixtures.repair_required: do not use old lightweight local timing calculation; use source visible-output clone data instead
do not use old lightweight local timing calculation; use source visible-output clone data instead
do not use old lightweight local timing calculation; use source visible-output clone data instead

production_blockers: Adopt an established astrology calculation engine/library as the timing calculation source of truth.
Remove captured visible-output samples as the production calculation path.
Disable the local lightweight timing-engine.js path as production timing logic.
Rebuild transits, secondary progressions, solar returns, and annual profections around the adopted existing engine and validate against the reference site output.
